holyChat

This is the holyChat project page. Here you can find details about the project, its features, and how it was developed.

Project Overview

Projekt: holyChat is a mobile application for fast communication between end users.

Tools: The app is written in React Native and built with Expo. I decided to integrate Gifted Chat for all necessary chat features and added NetInfo to apply certain features while being offline.
